description: Aqua Security provides cloud native security products for containers, Kubernetes, cloud posture management, and software supply chain security. It also maintains Trivy, an open source security scanner and related developer tooling.
summary: Aqua exposes two documented SaaS HTTP APIs in its developer center (Platform/CSPM and Image Scanning, with auth only partially documented), plus the public Trivy CLI and a public Trivy MCP server plugin.
